name: Polycam
description: 3D capture platform for LiDAR, photogrammetry, Gaussian Splats and NeRFs with mobile apps and a developer API.

seo.title: Polycam — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Polycam: 3D capture platform for LiDAR, photogrammetry, Gaussian Splats and NeRFs with mobile apps and a developer API.

when_to_use: Capturing and generating 3D models from photos or LiDAR scan
Building spatial computing features with 3D scene capture API
Digitizing physical spaces into 3D assets for AR/VR applications
Running photogrammetry pipelines from mobile device cameras

pros: Gaussian Splat and NeRF exports supported
cons: Free tier heavily restricted on exports
LiDAR quality depends on iPhone Pro hardware
API less documented than mobile app
review.verdict: Best-in-class mobile 3D capture; developers should price-check the API before betting pipelines on it.
review.best_for: AR, real-estate, and 3D creators capturing real-world spaces
review.not_for: Studios wanting fully-rigged CGI assets or AAA pipelines

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
